_comment: Contexte pre-calcule par le director en debut de cycle. Lu par les agents a la place de tous les docs.
_usage: Director ecrit ce fichier avant de dispatcher. Agents lisent UNIQUEMENT ce fichier pour le contexte.

selected_tasks.title: Reduce avg heal ceiling: HEAL_LIFE_max 7->5, GroqAdapter cap 7->5, constraints updated
Fog shader optimization -- simplify GLSL, reduce sin/cos calls, LOD-based density, target 60fps GTX 1060
Generate 20 new FastRoute cards (druides<=3, ankou>=4, all field quotas, heal<=5)

cycle12_completed.T001: White scenes fixed -- CanvasLayer+ColorRect in MerlinGame, MerlinCabinHub, Menu3DPC
cycle12_completed.T038: 3-stage drain scaling -- drainLifeScaled() in Store.ts, constants in Constants.ts
cycle12_completed.T039: Faction constraints locked -- druides<=15%, ankou>=20% in card_generation_constraints.json

T040: web-demo/src/game/Constants.ts -- EFFECT_CAPS.HEAL_LIFE stays 18 (engine cap, do NOT change)
T005: Optimization targets: reduce noise() sin/cos from 4 calls to 2, remove PlaneGeometry segments (already 1x1 = good), add distance-based density LOD, reduce uDensity from 0.35 to 0.25

fog_shader_analysis.current_fragment_ops: noise() = 4 trig calls + smoothstep*4 for edge fade = 8+ ops per fragment
optimization_plan: Reduce noise() to 2 trig calls (drop the extra 0.5-weighted terms)
Cache edgeFade as a single smoothstep on distance-from-center (1 op vs 4 smoothsteps)
Lower uDensity from 0.35 to 0.25 (reduces alpha overdraw)
Consider adding uTime modulo 1000.0 to avoid float precision drift on long sessions
Side: DoubleSide -> FrontSide (fog seen from above only, halves rasterization)
fog_shader_analysis.expected_gain: ~30-40% fragment shader cost reduction on tile-based GPUs

narrative_constraints_cycle13.themes: Mixed biomes -- emphasize druidic knowledge, ancestral wisdom, korrigan mischief, niamh healing, ankou threshold/death passage. Avoid druide-centric stories.
